summary_intro_strong: I am a developer with nearly five years of experience building web applications based on React and TypeScript.
summary_intro: In my most recent project, I worked within a Scrum framework, designing the architecture of an application built with Next.js, styled it with Tailwind based on Figma mockups, wrote unit tests in Jest, and managed the GitHub repository.
summary_paragraph_2: I focus on solving real problems: readable code, good architecture, and features that actually serve users. AI tools help me work faster, not think less.
summary_paragraph_3: I have experience in commercial team projects as well as independent design and deployment of websites.
summary_paragraph_4: Outside of work I enjoy electronics, technology, science, and designing raster and vector graphics — such as invitations and stickers.

achievements: Responsible for migrating the application from JavaScript to TypeScript, effectively eliminating production bugs;
Advanced Git proficiency: code reviews, branching strategies, and merge conflict resolution;
Collaborating with cross-functional teams (UX, Backend, QA, DevOps, Product, Support) in a team of 20 people;
Built a complete e-commerce interface from scratch;
projects: a cross-regional tourist information platform (for eg. meanderoravice.sk)

achievements: Participated in migrating the application from React to Next.js;
Delivered continuous frontend improvements across the application
projects: Dashboard for managing GPU server farms (simplemining.net)
